rows.label: qev030903_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Have you defeated them all?
With this, we can quietly wait for the beast
to which my father's soul should be offered, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0002
rows.name:
Good...
Now we just have to wait for an Aquila to come,
and we can mourn my father, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Oh! It's already here!
Was it called by my father's soul!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0004
rows.name:
O my father, Aldo Bergazas!
That soul which resided with the great Belgazas...
I return it to the next Aquila, zo!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's right! Father!
Become the blood and flesh of the Aquila
and race across the earth once more!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0006
rows.name:
...When we Bias die, we return our souls
to the beasts, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0007
rows.name:
And together with that beast,
they become the guardians of newly born lives, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0008
rows.name:
Grandpa too... if he was sent to such a splendid beast,
he must surely be satisfied, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0009
rows.name:
Uugh...
...Goodbye, Grandpa... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0010
rows.name:
Wh-What is that!?
Everyone! Something is coming from far away!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0011
rows.name:
Wh... What!!
A Garuda Hastara!?
Why is it in a place like this...! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0012
rows.name:
Everyone, it's coming this way!!
Scatter! Scatter, da!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Well, there was some trouble, but the mourning is complete, da.
As a result, he was eaten by such a massive beast, da.
My late father must be happy too. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Hmm? What is it?
Staring blankly like that...
Is there something strange about our Bias mourning? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_SEL0051
rows.name: Voice your doubts regarding the Bias funeral.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_SEL0061
rows.name: Say there is nothing strange about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0016
rows.name:
To live with beasts, and to die with beasts.
It is natural for us, da...
Was it unfamiliar to an Earthling? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0017
rows.name: ...Then think of it simply. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0018
rows.name:
Think of it as showing gratitude to the beasts that cared for us
by becoming meat for them to eat after we die, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0019
rows.name:
Heh heh, you are an understanding one, da!
Our customs are rarely understood, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0020
rows.name:
Other alien species
even call us barbaric, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0021
rows.name:
...That's right!
This means the next child to be born
will inherit the name Hastara, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030903_MSG0022
rows.name:
By all means, please tell Bazis about this
from your own mouth!
He will surely weep with joy, zo! [ST:wait ]
